highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.4 ships 22 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

breaking.title: Public API surface changed
breaking.body: The linked API-diff report for 3.119.4 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Linux Bionic native assets support; net48 full-framework target and use it for Windows validation; PolySharp for C# 13 support on legacy TFMs
contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so
contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Move AI agent config to shared location for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: SKGLView not rendering after tab switch in MAUI TabBar

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.so; Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll; Linux ARM64 crash: add fontconfig runtime library to cross-compile sysroot; AoT crash when IlcDisableReflection=true; libwebp to 1.6.0; skia submodule to point to squashed commit; brotli to 1.2.0; unused deps and add deps docs; libpng to 1.6.54; API guidelines and implement-issue skill.
